User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Low-value pages — no need to crawl or index
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

# AI crawlers — explicit allowlist for citation eligibility
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /tags/

User-agent: Bytespider
